action_set_definitions.name: get_portfolio_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current cash balance, asset holdings (symbol and quantity), and the transaction fee rate from the environment state.

action_set_definitions.name: get_market_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current market unit prices for all assets in the portfolio.

action_set_definitions.name: liquidate_vti_shares
action_set_definitions.description: Sells a specified quantity of VTI shares to raise cash, accounting for transaction fees.

quantity.description: The number of shares to sell.

action_set_definitions.name: draw_nav_credit_line
action_set_definitions.description: Draws a specified amount of cash from the NAV Credit Line facility.

amount.description: The amount of currency to draw from the credit line.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_capital_call
action_set_definitions.description: Executes the final transfer of funds to the private equity entity to satisfy the capital call.

entity_name.description: The name of the PE entity.

amount.description: The cash amount to be transferred.

state_description.cash_balance: The amount of liquid currency available for purchasing assets.
state_description.holdings: A dictionary mapping asset symbols to the quantity currently held in the portfolio.
state_description.market_prices: The current unit price for all trackable assets in the simulation.
state_description.transaction_fee_rate: The percentage fee charged on the total value of each trade.
state_description.current_step: The current discrete time step in the simulation.
